5032.issue: [S5032] "lib/tools.js" found in repo but not used anywhere. Consider removing file.

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#905] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.traccar/issues/905)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

8918.issue: [W8918] Workflow "automerge-dependabot.yml" references ioBroker action "iobroker-bot-orga/action-automerge-dependabot@main" with non-versioned ref "@main". Please use a versioned tag like "@v1".

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.traccar/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.2.3 specified. 3.3.2 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.traccar/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.traccar/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
